## etude capture-gate

Append a gate reviewer record to an existing etude run

```
etude capture-gate [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --gate-file string   path to gate JSON file, or - to read from stdin (required)
  -h, --help               help for capture-gate
      --run string         run id to append the gate record to (required)
```
